# Agent Fix PR

Use this template for PRs created or assisted by automation agents (Sonar remediation, AI reviewers, coding agents).

**Summary**
Describe the change and why it was needed.

**Checklist**
- [ ] Summary / Closes # included
- [ ] Type of change selected
- [ ] Node/TS pre-merge check acknowledged
- [ ] Flutter analyze check acknowledged
- [ ] Affected services listed
- [ ] Security notes present

**Notes for reviewers**
Add any special review instructions or risk notes here.
